candidates.sashaAngle: Concrete onboarding friction examples from a wallet perspective. No empty agreement.

candidates.text: Vegas is expensive, but thankfully not 10,000 BTC expensive 🍕 https://t.co/4kReRyZAfG
candidates.sashaAngle: Specific UX failure or success Sasha has observed. Not agreement — addition.
candidates.replyText: I've seen so many payment projects try to solve this with better UX, but the actual blocker for most people isn't transaction fees anymore. It's the opportunity cost of spending an appreciating asset.

candidates.text:
@lowercaseboot one of our internal sayings is that we want to make trading on base so good (best assets, best execution) that even if you hate us you have to trade on us (h/t @WilsonCusack)

lots more work to do but glad to see we are starting to deliver on that commitment :)

Capital with a brain.

Our new AI trading agent adapts in real time, reads regime, sizes positions intelligently, and never trades on emotion.

#AITrading #AIAgents #DeFi #Web3 #iotrader https://t.co/4z9upd3JiF
